subject: Re: Do you know a physicist at a top UK or US University?
body:
Jeffrey,
Many thanks for your quick response. It is a device that creats an electro magnetic field and is unique to anything that has been done before - which is why it requires a top physicist to understand and validate the technology. 
I am in meetings all day today but would like to send you an information pack for you to look at. What is the best number to reach you at over the weekend?
Emmy 
Sent from my BlackBerry® wireless device

-----Original Message-----
From: "J. Epstein" <jeeproject@yahoo.com>

Date: Thu, 29 May 2008 20:19:50 
To:Emmy Tayler <emtayler@gmail.com>
Subject: Re: Do you know a physicist at a top UK or US University?


need more details,, what do you need , hin to do,, what is the technology

 
----- Original Message ----
From: Emmy Tayler <emtayler@gmail.com>
Sent: Thursday, May 29, 2008 4:25:35 PM
Subject: Do you know a physicist at a top UK or US University?

 
Apologies for the mass e-mail, I hope it finds you well. 
  
We need an introduction to a top physicist who can validate groundbreaking technology for the treatment of fibromyalgia, arthiritis and various other ailments. We have a physics professor on board already who can explain the machine but we want a top University to put their name to it so that the treatment can be available to the public a soon as possible. 
  
There have been countless cases where ailments have been treated successfully and quickly. Can you help? 
  
Many thanks.
